required_mitigations: Use strcpy_s or strncpy with proper bounds checking
Ensure source string length <= 15 characters (destination buffer size - 1)
Validate input string length before copying

contract.notes: Classic buffer overflow - strcpy copies unlimited data into 16-byte fixed buffer without bounds checking
